Contact

Scroll to find out about how I can help

Please note that due to strict Parliamentary protocol, I am only able to make enquiries on behalf of my own constituents. To check if you live in my constituency, check your MP here

Here’s how I can help you:

As your MP I can help with a variety of issues and concerns.

First
steps

Keeping the issue private, I can write to the relevant department, official, or Minister or make a personal appointment to discuss the issue. This can often go a long way to providing a solution to your issue.

Making the
issue public

I can also help to make the issue public by raising it in the House of Commons, where it will be officially recorded, and could potentially come to the attention of the press and public.

Outside
Parliament

Outside Parliament, you can request that I speak at an event concerning your issue, pledge my support to a campaign or write to the local media on your behalf.

Book an appointment

I hold weekly advice surgeries. They are by appointment only. To make an appointment please send an email using the contact form.

Email Me

mike.reader.casework@parliament.uk

Book an Appointment

I run weekly constituency surgeries for face-to-face support. 

Book a Surgery Appointment
CONTACT MY OFFICE

My team in Northampton South can often help without you having to attend an advice surgery. Contact my constituency office via one of the ways listed below and a member of the team will get in touch.

Contact Details

Email address for constituency matters and support

  • mike.reader.casework
    @parliament.uk

Email address for parliamentary queries

  • mike.reader.mp
    @parliament.uk

Address

    London,
    SW1A 0AA

Sign up to my newsletter

Keep up to date with my work as your MP.

Your email address is never shared with any third parties.

You will only receive updates from Mike about his work Northampton South
